criteria.name: AI-Powered Content Creation
criteria.description: Ability of the app to generate engaging and relevant content, including captions, images, and videos, using AI algorithms.

criteria.name: Automated Scheduling
criteria.description: Capability to automatically schedule posts across multiple social media platforms at optimal times using AI-driven insights.

criteria.name: Social Listening and Analytics
criteria.description: Extent to which the app uses AI to monitor social media for brand mentions, sentiment analysis, and competitor analysis, providing actionable insights.

criteria.name: AI-Driven Engagement
criteria.description: Use of AI to automate and enhance engagement with the audience, such as automated replies, hashtag generation, and personalized recommendations.

criteria.name: Cross-Platform Integration
criteria.description: Seamless integration with multiple social media platforms (e.g., Facebook, Instagram, X, LinkedIn, TikTok, YouTube, Pinterest).
